name: modulo
description: Premium frontend design system with 59 skills, 9 commands, and 12 agents for creating 90k-quality websites. Covers UI patterns, e-commerce, payments, CMS, maps, social features, PWA, analytics, multi-tenant, onboarding, print/PDF, design tokens, SEO/GEO, accessibility, i18n, performance, testing, and more. Includes specialized agents for performance auditing, SEO optimization, accessibility compliance, responsive testing, Figma-to-code translation, component documentation, framework migration, and design system health. Works with Next.js and Astro.
